name: p-duke
tagline: High-Reliability DC-DC Converters and AC-DC Power Modules for Demanding Applications
description: P-Duke is a leading manufacturer of high-reliability DC-DC converters and AC-DC power modules, offering rugged power solutions for railway, industrial, medical, and military applications with exceptional performance in harsh environments.
longDescription: P-Duke Technology, established in 1992 in Taiwan, has become a trusted name in high-reliability power conversion solutions. With over 30 years of experience, P-Duke specializes in designing and manufacturing DC-DC converters and AC-DC power modules that operate reliably in the most demanding environments. Their product portfolio includes ultra-wide input range converters, railway-certified power supplies, medical-grade isolation modules, and military-standard power solutions. P-Duke's commitment to quality is demonstrated through comprehensive certifications including EN 50155 for railway, IEC 60601-1 for medical, and MIL-STD-810 for military applications. All products undergo rigorous testing including burn-in, temperature cycling, and environmental stress screening to ensure long-term reliability.

seoTitle: P-Duke DC-DC Converters | Railway & Medical Power | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of P-Duke DC-DC converters, AC-DC power modules, and railway-certified power supplies. Technical support and fast delivery for industrial and medical applications.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo Electronics an authorized distributor of P-Duke products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor of P-Duke power conversion products. As an authorized distributor, we provide genuine P-Duke products with full manufacturer warranty, technical support, and access to the complete product portfolio. Our partnership with P-Duke ensures you receive authentic products, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain support for your projects.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your P-Duke power supply requirements and receive a competitive quotation.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of P-Duke power products?
faqs.answer: P-Duke power products offer several distinct advantages: Ultra-wide input ranges (up to 14:1) accommodate varying source voltages; High reliability with MTBF ratings exceeding 1 million hours; Extreme temperature operation (-40°C to +105°C) for harsh environments; Comprehensive certifications including railway EN 50155 and medical IEC 60601-1; Compact high-density designs save PCB space; 3-year warranty standard on most products; Burn-in testing ensures out-of-box reliability. These features make P-Duke ideal for demanding applications in railway, industrial, and medical equipment.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for product selection guidance based on your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: What industries does P-Duke primarily serve?
faqs.answer: P-Duke serves a diverse range of industries with specialized power solutions: Railway and transportation with EN 50155 certified products for rolling stock; Industrial automation with rugged converters for factory environments; Medical equipment with 2xMOPP isolation for patient safety; Defense and military with MIL-STD qualified products; Telecommunications with high-reliability power for infrastructure. Each industry has specific product lines optimized for their unique environmental and certification requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our P-Duke product categories or contact us for industry-specific power supply recommendations.

faqs.question: What support services does BeiLuo provide for P-Duke products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive support for P-Duke products: Technical consultation and product selection assistance from our experienced FAE team; Application engineering support for power supply integration; Sample provision for evaluation and testing; Custom power solution design services; Stock inventory for fast delivery on standard products; After-sales technical support and warranty service. Our goal is to ensure you select the optimal P-Duke solution for your application and receive support throughout your project lifecycle.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical support team to discuss your power supply design requirements and receive expert guidance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right P-Duke converter for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right P-Duke converter involves several key considerations: First, determine your input voltage range including minimum and maximum values; Second, calculate your output power requirements with appropriate margin; Third, identify required isolation voltage and safety certifications; Fourth, consider environmental conditions including operating temperature range; Fifth, evaluate mechanical requirements such as package type and mounting; Sixth, assess special features needed such as remote control or parallel operation. P-Duke offers selection tools, and our FAE team can provide personalized recommendations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our converter selection guide or contact our FAE team for personalized product recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for P-Duke products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for P-Duke products vary by product type and availability: Standard catalog products typically ship from stock within 1-2 business days; High-volume or specialized products may have 4-6 week lead times; Custom configurations or special models may require 6-8 weeks; Railway and medical certified products often have longer lead times due to additional testing. BeiLuo Electronics maintains stock of popular P-Duke models for fast delivery. For large projects or ongoing production, we can arrange scheduled deliveries and inventory programs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and stock availability on specific P-Duke models.

faqs.question: Does P-Duke offer railway-certified power supplies?
faqs.answer: Yes, P-Duke offers an extensive range of EN 50155 certified power supplies for railway applications. Their railway product portfolio includes: DC-DC converters with 14:1 ultra-wide input ranges for battery-fed systems; AC-DC power modules with surge protection for harsh electrical environments; Products certified to EN 50155, EN 61373, and EN 45545-2 fire safety; Operating temperature ranges from -40°C to +105°C; Shock and vibration resistance for rolling stock applications; 3-year warranty on railway products. These power supplies are used in train control systems, passenger information systems, lighting, and HVAC controls worldwide.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our railway power specialists for assistance with EN 50155 compliant power solutions.
